send_to_cs: Shipping inquiries on a current order
For product or general inquiries you can't find the answer to, use PGI shortcut
escalate: No escalations for this client, send everything to CS
tone: Don't use the word "unfortunately" to discuss our appointment structure
Don't use the word "best" to reference a product (e.g., best ring, etc.)
templates: If cx are looking for an engagement ring and don't provide specifics, use LER shortcut
dos_and_donts: If the customer responds incorrectly to the journey, don't send jny temp, recommend items based on their selection instead
Cx can create their own engagement ring on the webiste by choosing a setting, stone and size
Cx can customize rings by working with designers who will use their ideas, drawings, images to create the ring they want
Don't disclose the locations of their labs/production facilities
drive_to_purchase: Be MORE SALESY, if the customer is showing intent to purchase then:
➜ Ask open-ended general questions such as style & material
➜ After asking open-ended questions, transition to specific questions such as center stone, etc.
➜ If the customer liked our recommendation, push for the sale by asking about payment options or when they hope to have the item
promo_and_exclusions: Please see here for current offer details: https://www.brilliantearth.com/promo-codes-and-offers/

escalation_preferences: For questions regarding order, service, shipping questions on a current order, post-purchase will go to cssupport@brilliantearth.com
For product or general inquiry questions, please contact info@brilliantearth.com

conversation.message_text: Brilliant Earth: Welcome to Brilliant Earth! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Brilliant Earth: Hi! I'm Ava, your personal jewelry concierge. Do you have any questions I can help answer? brilliantearth.attn.tv/ajR8M7sG4gqY .

Brilliant Earth: It's Ava, your jewelry expert! Still thinking about that piece? Continue where you left off: brilliantearth.attn.tv/arpS07hd1B1g .

Text me back with any questions!

Brilliant Earth: What jewelry are you shopping for next? 

Reply with a number to let us know:

1 - Engagement Rings
2 - Wedding Rings
3 - Fine Jewelry
4 - Everything!
Brilliant Earth: Everyone's obsessed with these styles. Shop before they sell out: brilliantearth.attn.tv/aY5PrsTpiFVQ .
Brilliant Earth: YOUR RING, YOUR WAY. Pair your dream diamond with one of our award-winning settings: brilliantearth.attn.tv/aqRKUPWNMFtd .
Do you all sell the chocolate diamond engagement sets

Brilliant Earth: Thanks for reaching out! Brilliant Earth specializes in ethically sourced natural and lab-grown diamonds, as well as colored gemstones. At this time, we don't offer chocolate diamond engagement sets in their standard collection. What you can do is customize a ring by choosing a setting you love and then selecting a fancy-color diamond or gemstone through their 'Create Your Own Ring' option. You can explore engagement ring settings here: https://brilliantearth.attn.tv/aly7xubdswOM/

Help
Fashion Nova: Thanks for reaching out! This is Alexa, and I'm here to help. Let me know how. I'm just one click away!

I purchased an order yesterday & was expecting it to be delivered to Florida by tomorrow but now it's saying it won't be delivered until Monday . I'm leaving New York tonight to go to Florida for a few days & expected to receive my clothes tomorrow. I will not be in Florida on Monday to receive my package.. can I get a refund ?

Fashion Nova: I'm so sorry for the inconvenience that this has caused you. Please note that we do not provide cash refunds. Returns are refunded via store credit in the form of a Fashion Nova gift card. Returns are processed within 5-7 business days after your item(s) are delivered to us. To receive your store credit more quickly, use the pre-paid return label option in our Returns Portal: http://sms.fashionnova.com/avewz6DoBVwR Let me know how that goes. I'm just one click away!
Can you process a gift card for me ?
Template used: "Where's my gift card?"; last updated: 2024-08-08 14:14:19.465

Fashion Nova: Gift cards are delivered by email along with the instructions on how to redeem them. Have you checked your spam and promo folders as sometimes our emails end up there? For more details, this will be best handled by visiting http://sms.fashionnova.com/a6dtEbj7AUj6 and beginning an inquiry with our team!
